arts.ttl: Alan Brazil worried by missing Celtic ingredient as Kieran Tierney Arsenal 'disappointment' expressed
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers' men 13 clear in the league and have bagged a cup but that hasn't stopping Brazil having concerns

arts.ttl: Celtic told Ange Postecoglou is 'screaming out' for a player they have Tottenham could get for under £20m
arts.sum: Ange Postecoglou needs ‘frightening’ Celtic hero Kyogo Furuhashi at Spurs Kyogo Furuhashi’s goal-scoring record at Celtic under Ange Postecoglou vs Brendan Rodgers

arts.ttl: I really love him: Arne Engels lauds influence of team mate Greg Taylor at Celtic
arts.sum: Arne Engels has provided an insight into the influence that his Celtic team mate Greg Taylor has on and off the pitch at Parkhead.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers states how Greg Taylor is feeling after speaking to Celtic star post-Kieran Tierney chants
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers says Greg Taylor is ‘absolutely fine’ after Celtic fans chants for Kieran Tierney Brendan Rodgers will be hoping Celtic do their talking on the field of play on Wednesday night ahead of Dundee United’s visit.

arts.ttl: Simon Jordan slams Brendan Rodgers for leaving Celtic in 2019 after Kieran Tierney comments
arts.sum: Simon Jordan reminds Brendan Rodgers he left Celtic in 2019 for Leicester City The name of Kieran Tierney has been doing the rounds, as he is expected to leave Arsenal this month and Celtic want to bring him back to where it all began.

arts.ttl: Arne Engels details Celtic derby day from hell from throwing up his breakfast to throwing coins
arts.sum: The Belgian had to be withdrawn from the Hoops' starting line against Rangers and things only got worse as the day went on

arts.ttl: CELTIC CONFIDENTIAL: The former favourite who WON'T be coming back to Parkhead, and the faithful defender set to head out in search of first-team football
arts.sum: CELTIC CONFIDENTIAL: Celtic fans have been waiting for news on a potential reunion for fan favourite and the Parkhead faithful after he struggled following his move away from the club.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers uses 'mannequins' analogy as he expands on his Celtic crowd criticism
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers will continue to voice his opinion on issues that concern him despite the negative reaction to his Celtic crowd comments.

arts.ttl: Why Ibrox coin incident bolstered Arne Engels' belief in Celtic's title credentials
arts.sum: Arne Engels has revealed why the fallout to the Ibrox coin incident last week heartened him - and increased his belief in Celtic's title credentials.

arts.ttl: Jota sees Rennes transfer exit route open as Celtic diehards dream of return for winger who loves the Hoops 'for life'
arts.sum: The winger only joined Rennes last summer but has struggled to hold down a regular place with the Ligue 1 side
